rationale: Improvement to implement database enumeration spec feature; not fixing incorrect existing behavior, adding new capability.
Integer underflow crash in BSON codewscope parsing; implementation safety bug, no specific spec rule contradicted.
SDAM compatibility check incorrectly flags unknown-state servers; internal initialization quirk, not a specific spec rule violation.
OP_MSG bulk write test assertion failure about message count; internal test/implementation issue, not a spec rule violation.
Travis CI build broken; CI failure with no driver behavior or spec involvement.
NEWS file UTF-8 encoding broken by a prior commit; packaging/release artifact issue, no spec involvement.
Struct zeroing hack leaves tags/compressors fields invalid; internal implementation bug, no specific spec rule violated.
Autotools configure script boolean bug for --with-zlib=system; build system bug, no spec involvement.
API documentation example passes wrong number of arguments; docs-only bug, no driver behavior or spec involved.
Shell $((..)) expression incompatible with BusyBox in configure script; build portability bug, no spec involvement.
Race condition in test readable_writable/pooled; flaky test due to background scanner scheduling, no spec rule violated.
Debian package missing CMake config files; packaging/distribution bug, no spec involvement.
Description says 'Obey this spec update': SDAM spec now requires recording isMaster.primary even when address != isMaster.me.
Remove Google Analytics from Debian-packaged HTML docs; privacy/packaging issue, no driver behavior or spec involvement.
BSON Decimal128 spec requires 34 digits max; driver emits 35, writing one byte past end of fixed buffer.
Adding regression test for null bson_error_t pointer in compatibility check; internal API contract test, not spec conformance.
JSON RFC compliance: disallow null characters in JSON strings; JSON RFC compliance, not a MongoDB driver spec area.
Malformed JSON triggers assert instead of error return; internal error-handling bug in JSON parser, not a MongoDB spec area.
Add CMake support for building against LibreSSL; build feature, no driver behavior or spec involvement.
configure --with-zlib=no rejected despite help text advertising it; build system bug, no spec involvement.
pkg-config flags reference -lsnappy without declaring libsnappy-dev dependency in Debian package; packaging bug.
OP_MSG document sequence length written as native endian instead of required little-endian per wire protocol spec.
SDAM spec requires marking server Unknown on 'not master' error; driver missing this since SDAM 1.2.0 implementation.
UBSan misaligned address warning in OP_MSG RPC scatter due to pragma pack(1); internal alignment bug, no spec rule violated.
Coverity-reported memory leak in SRV topology initialization loop; resource management bug, no spec rule violated.
DNS seedlist spec says clients SHOULD use res_search not res_query; driver used res_query, missing domain search behavior.
collect_tests_from_dir() always returns zero files on Windows; JSON/YAML spec tests silently not run on that platform.
CMake generates mongoc-config.h before MONGOC_ENABLE_COMPRESSION variable is set; build ordering bug.
Deprecate old update API lacking collation/arrayFilters; API ergonomics improvement, not a spec compliance bug.
Mock server test infrastructure improvement to abort on duplicate BSON fields sent by client under test.
Description explicitly says 'should conform to PyMongo and other drivers: a single oversized document aborts the bulk operation.'
BSON DBPOINTER string length not bounds-checked, possible out-of-bounds read; safety bug, no specific BSON spec rule named.
GSSAPI test crashes in sasl_client_new on specific SSL+SASL config; CI test crash, internal implementation bug.
Segfault when client destroyed before session; resource ownership bug, no sessions spec rule about destruction order.
GSSAPI docs use same hostname for KDC and MongoDB server; documentation clarity improvement only.
Enable live replica set/sharded tests under Valgrind in CI; CI coverage improvement, no spec behavior involved.
Null dereference in SCRAM when username is null; implementation safety bug, not a SCRAM spec rule violation.
Replica set auth tests not being executed in CI; CI configuration gap, not a spec conformance issue.
OP_MSG has no slaveOkay bit; spec was silent on $readPreference for Single topology OP_MSG; fix required SPEC-991 amendment.
Sessions spec says arbiters MUST be excluded when checking cluster session support; driver incorrectly included them.
Decision to stop bundling libsnappy; build/packaging architectural decision, no spec behavior involved.
Add snappy/zlib linker flags to CMake and pkg-config installed files; build system improvement, no spec involvement.
Regression: bulk execute returns without initializing reply bson_t when client is null; internal API contract bug.
Clarify whether callers must always bson_destroy reply from find_and_modify; documentation/API contract clarification.
Void pointer arithmetic and return-void-expression are GNU extensions not allowed in C99; build/portability fix.
Add link from C driver change stream docs to MongoDB server docs; documentation improvement only.
GSSAPI canonicalizeHostName=true causes hang in mongoc_stream_get_base_stream; implementation bug, no spec rule named.
ISO C pedantic warning about %n$ format operands on Ubuntu 16.04; compiler portability fix, no spec involvement.
Docs incorrectly expose internal type mongoc_stream_gridfs_t and describe wrong return type; docs-only bug.
Memory leak in _mongoc_cyrus_set_mechanism: bson_string_free called with free_segment=0; resource management bug.
